title: Classic Egypt
description: Experience the ultimate journey through ancient history, taking you from the towering Pyramids to the majestic temples of the Nile.
heroDescription: Discover the timeless wonders of Egypt on this premium 8-day adventure. Enjoy exclusive tours of the Giza Plateau, uncover the secrets of the Valley of the Kings, and sail the historic Nile while staying in unparalleled 5-star luxury.

itinerary.title: Pyramids & The Sphinx
itinerary.description: Arrive in Cairo and marvel at the majestic Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx. Enjoy a luxury stay right by the plateau.

itinerary.title: Temples of Luxor
itinerary.description: Fly to Luxor to explore Karnak Temple and the Valley of the Kings, stepping into the grand tombs of ancient pharaohs.

itinerary.title: Aswan's Island Magic
itinerary.description: Journey to Aswan to visit the Philae Temple and relax on the Nile before departing from this beautiful southern city.

hotels.name: Marriott Mena House
hotels.description: A historic, luxury hotel offering unparalleled, up-close views of the magnificent Great Pyramids.

hotels.name: Sofitel Winter Palace
hotels.description: A historic, grand hotel on the banks of the Nile built in 1886.

title: Nile Majesty
description: A fast-paced yet comprehensive journey covering the most significant archaeological treasures of Upper Egypt.
heroDescription: Perfect for travelers short on time but hungry for history. This 5-day essential route captures the magic of Luxor's sprawling temples and the serenity of Aswan's Nubian heritage at an unbeatable value.

itinerary.title: Luxor Exploration
itinerary.description: Discover the vast Karnak complex and the illuminated Luxor Temple by night.

itinerary.title: Aswan Highlights
itinerary.description: Travel south to Aswan to witness the Unfinished Obelisk and the island-bound Philae Temple.

hotels.name: Steigenberger Nile Palace
hotels.description: Offering beautiful architecture and excellent river views in the heart of Luxor.

title: Red Sea Bliss
description: Escape to the coastal paradise of Hurghada for a week of pristine beaches, snorkeling, and complete relaxation.
heroDescription: Unwind on the golden shores of the Red Sea. Enjoy exclusive boutique resort amenities, daily snorkeling trips to vibrant coral reefs, and tranquil sunset dinners overlooking the water.
includes: 5 nights at a premium beachfront resort

itinerary.title: Arrival & Relaxation
itinerary.description: Settle into your beachfront resort and enjoy the all-inclusive amenities and private beach.

itinerary.title: Giftun Island Adventure
itinerary.description: Take a boat out to Giftun Island for a day of world-class snorkeling among vibrant reefs.

itinerary.title: Aqua Fun & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy the thrilling slides at Makadi Bay Water World before your departure.

hotels.name: Sunrise Crystal Bay
hotels.description: An elegant, adults-only resort featuring a tranquil private lagoon.

title: Sharm Escapade
description: Experience the absolute pinnacle of luxury diving and desert resort living on the spectacular Sinai Peninsula.
heroDescription: Immerse yourself in world-class diving at Ras Mohammed and lavish pampering at a premium 5-star resort. This package is designed for those who demand the finest service, dining, and marine exploration.

itinerary.title: Luxury Check-in & Naama Bay
itinerary.description: Arrive at your premium resort. Spend your first days exploring the vibrant Naama Bay and enjoying the house reef.
itinerary.stay: Four Seasons Resort Sharm El Sheikh

itinerary.title: Ras Mohammed Diving
itinerary.description: Experience guided excursions into Ras Mohammed National Park, witnessing some of the world's best coral ecosystems.
itinerary.stay: Four Seasons Resort Sharm El Sheikh

hotels.name: Four Seasons Resort Sharm El Sheikh
hotels.description: A stunning luxury resort offering world-class diving and spectacular Red Sea views.

title: Desert Safari
description: Leave the city behind and venture deep into the surreal, chalk-white landscapes of the Egyptian Western Desert.
heroDescription: An adventure-focused itinerary that trades city noise for starry nights. Explore the ancient wonders of Cairo before heading off-road into the breathtaking White Desert and Crystal Mountain.

itinerary.title: Cairo Culture
itinerary.description: Explore the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar and the historical Cairo Citadel before your desert journey.

itinerary.title: Into the White Desert
itinerary.description: Take a 4x4 into the Farafra depression. Witness the sparkling Crystal Mountain and camp near the surreal chalk formations.

hotels.name: Badawiya Hotel Farafra
hotels.description: An authentic mud-brick lodge providing comfortable basecamps for desert exploration.

title: Oasis Retreat
description: Disconnect entirely in the legendary Siwa Oasis, staying in a world-renowned eco-lodge with no electricity.
heroDescription: A transformative journey blending Cairo's historic charm with the utter isolation and peace of the Siwa Oasis. Bathe in Cleopatra's Pool and sleep under the stars in unparalleled eco-luxury.

itinerary.title: Cairo Transit
itinerary.description: Arrive in Cairo and relax in a boutique Nile hotel before your long journey to the oasis.

itinerary.title: Siwa Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Travel to Siwa. Explore the Shali Fortress, swim in Cleopatra's Pool, and enjoy candlelit dinners at your eco-lodge.

hotels.name: Adrere Amellal
hotels.description: A world-famous, electricity-free eco-lodge built into a mountain.

title: Alexandrian Dream
description: A coastal and cultural pairing of Egypt's two greatest cities, featuring museums, citadels, and the Mediterranean Sea.
heroDescription: Trace the steps of ancient scholars and kings. From the bustling streets of Islamic Cairo to the refreshing sea breeze of Alexandria's Corniche, this trip highlights Egypt's Mediterranean heritage.

itinerary.title: Cairo Classics
itinerary.description: Visit the Egyptian Museum and take a peaceful stroll through Al-Azhar Park.

itinerary.title: Mediterranean Pearl
itinerary.description: Travel to Alexandria. Visit the iconic Bibliotheca Alexandrina and the imposing Qaitbay Citadel on the harbor.

hotels.name: Steigenberger Cecil Hotel
hotels.description: A historic 1920s hotel perfectly located directly on the sweeping Alexandria Corniche.

title: Diver's Paradise
description: A laid-back, adventure-packed stay in Dahab, famous for its bohemian vibe and the world-renowned Blue Hole.
heroDescription: For those who prefer a relaxed pace mixed with intense adventure. Dahab offers incredible underwater sinkholes by day and a vibrant, chilled-out beachfront cafe culture by night.

itinerary.title: The Blue Hole
itinerary.description: Settle into your beachfront resort and spend your days snorkeling or diving the infamous Blue Hole.

itinerary.title: Mount Sinai Ascent
itinerary.description: Embark on a nighttime trek up Mount Sinai for a spectacular sunrise, followed by relaxation on the beach.

hotels.name: Swiss Inn Resort Dahab
hotels.description: A relaxed, family-friendly beachfront resort set directly on the golden sands of the Red Sea.

title: Ultimate Egypt
description: The grand tour. See every major highlight of Egypt, from the northern pyramids down to the southern temples, ending on the beach.
heroDescription: Leave no stone unturned. This comprehensive 12-day luxury expedition perfectly balances the intense historical exploration of the Nile Valley with the sheer relaxation of a premium Red Sea resort.

itinerary.title: Pyramids to Museums
itinerary.description: Explore the Giza Plateau and the incredible artifacts of the Egyptian Museum.

itinerary.title: Nile River Valley
itinerary.description: Fly to Luxor, explore the Valley of the Kings, and travel down to Aswan to see the Abu Simbel temples.

itinerary.title: Red Sea Recovery
itinerary.description: Fly to Hurghada for four days of total relaxation, beach lounging, and luxury dining.

hotels.name: The Nile Ritz-Carlton
hotels.description: An iconic luxury hotel located in the heart of downtown Cairo.

hotels.name: Steigenberger ALDAU Beach
hotels.description: A spectacular beach resort offering expansive pools and private golf.

title: Historical Depths
description: Skip Cairo entirely and focus on the deep Greek, Roman, and Pharaonic histories of Alexandria and Upper Egypt.
heroDescription: A unique route designed for repeat visitors or intense history buffs. Contrast the Greco-Roman ruins and coastal fortresses of Alexandria with the massive Pharaonic pillars of Luxor and Aswan.

itinerary.title: Alexandria's Past
itinerary.description: Discover the Qaitbay Citadel and the stunning Montazah Palace Gardens.

itinerary.title: Luxor's Grandeur
itinerary.description: Fly south to Luxor to witness the incredible scale of Karnak Temple and the Colossi of Memnon.

itinerary.title: Aswan's Monuments
itinerary.description: Conclude your trip exploring the Unfinished Obelisk and the island temple of Philae.

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel Alexandria
hotels.description: An ultra-luxurious, Mediterranean-style resort offering a private sandy beach.

title: Nature & History
description: An off-beat path combining the lush Nile environment of Aswan with the stark, alien beauty of the Western Desert.
heroDescription: Experience Egypt's environmental extremes. Float down the Nile among the green islands of Aswan, then travel to the remote Farafra oasis to witness the bizarre chalk sculptures of the White Desert.

itinerary.title: Aswan Islands
itinerary.description: Explore the Philae Temple and sail the Nile around Elephantine Island.

itinerary.title: White Desert Expedition
itinerary.description: Travel to Farafra. Camp under the stars surrounded by the massive white chalk rock formations.

hotels.name: Badawiya Hotel Farafra
hotels.description: An authentic mud-brick lodge providing comfortable basecamps for desert exploration.

title: Coastal Heritage
description: Experience Egypt's dual coastlines—the historical Mediterranean north and the vibrant, reef-filled Red Sea east.
heroDescription: A tale of two seas. Begin in the crisp Mediterranean air of Alexandria exploring Greek ruins, then fly to the Sinai Peninsula to indulge in the world's best diving and luxury resorts in Sharm El Sheikh.

itinerary.title: Mediterranean History
itinerary.description: Visit the Bibliotheca Alexandrina and stroll the Montazah Palace Gardens overlooking the sea.

itinerary.title: Red Sea Luxury
itinerary.description: Fly to Sharm El Sheikh. Spend your days snorkeling at Ras Mohammed and relaxing in premium cabanas.

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel Alexandria
hotels.description: An ultra-luxurious resort offering a private sandy beach and classic elegance.

hotels.name: Rixos Premium Seagate
hotels.description: A massive, ultra-all-inclusive premium resort featuring luxury cabanas.
